scope.target: Audience placement, README/INDEX ownership, and weak inbound routes
constraints: No deletion based only on low inbound count

execution.last_completed_step: Moved human guides, merged conditional EF Core guidance, retired replaced prompt bodies, separated README purpose from complete INDEX catalogs, and added active inbound routes for retained weak-reference material.
execution.next_action: Start VALIDATE-001 truthful validator coverage and shell lifecycle taxonomy.

results.summary: Resolved standards/guide audience placement and weak routing by preserving useful guidance under human-facing owners, retiring only replaced prompt bodies, and establishing complete README/INDEX ownership across the affected standards and guide areas.
tests_run: AI context validation passed with 24 active indexes
7 local catalogs covered every retained file
Quick gate passed 14/14 required checks, including 49 analyzer tests, 2 configuration tests, and 25 packaging/safe-apply tests with 1 Windows symlink privilege skip
results.residual_risk: Independent verification must confirm that the new routing remains sufficient for clean navigation. Historical workflow records intentionally retain old paths as evidence.
